name: Yellow Squash Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Mix all ingredients together in a bowl until well combined.
3. Place the mixture into an uncooked frozen pie shell.
4. Bake for 40 to 45 minutes, or until set and lightly browned.
5. Allow the pie to cool before serving.
Submitted from a southern girl in Charleston, South Carolina
